subject: Recovery
details:
Week 1 focus: Post-training recovery
Longer holds after hard sessions

Session structure:
• Breath & warm (2 min) — Easy nasal breathing, neck and shoulder rolls
• Lower body (6 min) — Hip flexor, hamstring, calf, figure-4 stretch
• Core & spine (4 min) — Cat-cow, child's pose, gentle twist
• Close (3 min) — Hold any tight area; slow breath

Instagram drill library:
• https://www.instagram.com/reel/DW_zewYkeet/

Theme focus: mobility, flexibility, recovery, hip and hamstring openness, breath work

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 1 focus: Placement
Inside foot — low corners, same technique every rep

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Passing into space, light touches
• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners
• Movement finishes (15 min) — Receive-pass-shoot or dribble-cut-shoot
• Pressure reps (10 min) — Time limit or consecutive goals
• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 1 focus: Easy aerobic
30–40 min comfortable pace — build base, conversation effort

Session structure:
• Warm-up (10 min) — Easy jog, dynamic stretch, A-skips
• Main set (25 min) — Intervals or steady tempo — see weekly focus
• Strides / accelerations (10 min) — 4–6 short bursts with full walk-back recovery
• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips

details:
Week 3 focus: One-touch finishes
Wall or partner feed; adjust body early

• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

details:
Week 1 focus: Placement
Inside foot — low corners, same technique every rep

• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners

• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

Session structure:
• Breath & warm (2 min) — Easy nasal breathing, neck and shoulder rolls
• Lower body (6 min) — Hip flexor, hamstring, calf, figure-4 stretch
• Core & spine (4 min) — Cat-cow, child's pose, gentle twist
• Close (3 min) — Hold any tight area; slow breath

Instagram drill library:
• https://www.instagram.com/reel/DW_zewYkeet/

Theme focus: mobility, flexibility, recovery, hip and hamstring openness, breath work

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 3 focus: Tempo run
15–20 min comfortably hard — steady, no sprinting

Session structure:
• Warm-up (10 min) — Easy jog, dynamic stretch, A-skips
• Main set (25 min) — Intervals or steady tempo — see weekly focus
• Strides / accelerations (10 min) — 4–6 short bursts with full walk-back recovery
• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips

• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

Cut inside, laces drive, 6–12 yards out

• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

6–8 × 2 min hard / 2 min jog — quality over volume

• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips

details:
Week 4 focus: Weak-foot shooting
All finishes non-dominant; technique over power

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Passing into space, light touches
• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners

• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

details:
Week 2 focus: Interval repeats
6–8 × 2 min hard / 2 min jog — quality over volume

• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 1 focus: Placement
Inside foot — low corners, same technique every rep

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Passing into space, light touches
• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners
• Movement finishes (15 min) — Receive-pass-shoot or dribble-cut-shoot
• Pressure reps (10 min) — Time limit or consecutive goals
• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

Week 3 focus: Hip focus
Runners' hips — pigeon, lizard, 90/90

Session structure:
• Breath & warm (2 min) — Easy nasal breathing, neck and shoulder rolls
• Lower body (6 min) — Hip flexor, hamstring, calf, figure-4 stretch
• Core & spine (4 min) — Cat-cow, child's pose, gentle twist
• Close (3 min) — Hold any tight area; slow breath

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 3 focus: One-touch finishes
Wall or partner feed; adjust body early

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Passing into space, light touches
• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners
• Movement finishes (15 min) — Receive-pass-shoot or dribble-cut-shoot
• Pressure reps (10 min) — Time limit or consecutive goals
• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

subject: Soccer
details:
Week 3 focus: Tempo run
15–20 min comfortably hard — steady, no sprinting

Session structure:
• Warm-up (10 min) — Easy jog, dynamic stretch, A-skips
• Main set (25 min) — Intervals or steady tempo — see weekly focus
• Strides / accelerations (10 min) — 4–6 short bursts with full walk-back recovery
• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips

details:
Week 1 focus: Placement
Inside foot — low corners, same technique every rep

Session structure:
• Warm-up (8 min) — Passing into space, light touches
• Technique block (15 min) — Static ball — placement corners

• Pressure reps (10 min) — Time limit or consecutive goals
• Cooldown (2 min) — Easy passes

• Cooldown (5 min) — Easy jog or walk, stretch calves and hips
